since_last: 76% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.27%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 76% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC +0.43% · Gold +1.49% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 76% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.27%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.27%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +8.75%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +8.75%, ANET +8.33%, AMD +6.74%, TSLA +6.53%, SOUN +6.26%. Laggards: AVAV -7.33%, SPCX -2.47%, DDOG -1.92%, SNAP -1.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.47% at $158.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
